title: Clean Title Screen
description: Makes the title screen much cleaner by removing the title and the copyright information.
body:
## Clean Title Screen
A simple pack that removes some things from the title screen and menu. Here are the following things that are removed:
- The main "Minecraft" title
- The splash texts next to the main title
- The "Java Edition" text under the main title
- The copyright information on the title screen
- The "Minecraft" and "Realms" logo on the realms screen
- The "Select World" text in the singleplayer screen
- The "Play Multiplayer" text in the multiplayer screen
- The "Game Menu" text in the game/pause menu

Because the copyright text has been removed, you can no longer click the text to go to the credits and attribution page. However, you can still visit this page via the options menu and visiting the "Credits & Attribution" section.

Leave comments about this project on it's [Planet Minecraft Page.](https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/clean-title-screen-6458069/)
